description_long: This is a large, modern ranch-style house set on a spacious, manicured green lot with a circular driveway leading up to the main entrance. The house features a white exterior with a dark, multi-gabled roof and several prominent chimneys. Multiple windows are arranged in symmetrical rows along the front and sides, providing ample natural light. The property is bordered by a low fence and includes several landscaped patches, possibly for gardens or decorative purposes. The driveway forms a loop in front of the house, with a central landscaped island. The overall setting suggests a suburban or semi-rural estate, designed for comfort and curb appeal.
description: A large, white ranch-style house with a dark gabled roof, circular driveway, and symmetrical window rows, set on a spacious green lot with landscaped features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular driveway, and symmetrical facade with multiple windows and a central landscaped island.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the driveway extending to the entrance, and the arrangement of windows along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the expanse of the green lot with landscaped patches.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway loop, side entrance, and the continuation of the symmetrical window arrangement.
attribute_entryway_design: Central main door with steps, covered porch, and decorative columns flanked by symmetrical windows.
